name: Portless
description: Installs portless for localhost subdomain routing. Runs portless in-container on the proxyPort to demux per-branch routes by Host header. With lace, declares portlessAlias=true so the project participates in lace's shared host-portless-on-:1355 routing.

proxyPort.description: Container-internal portless proxy port. Bound by the feature's entrypoint via `portless proxy start --port $PROXY_PORT --no-tls`. Lace maps this to a host-allocated port (22425-22499) and registers it as an alias on the shared host portless.

version.description: Portless version to install (npm version specifier).
